FStringPerformanceControlExperimentName_.purpose: Improves the speed and efficiency of text handling in games.

FFlagPeoplePageLazyRenderCards_Staged.mechanism: Loads user profiles and cards only when they are visible to the player.
FFlagPeoplePageLazyRenderCards_Staged.purpose: Reduces loading times and improves the overall experience on the People page.

DFIntRbxStorageMinAvailableSpaceBeforeCl.mechanism: Sets a minimum storage space threshold before cleaning up unused data.
DFIntRbxStorageMinAvailableSpaceBeforeCl.purpose: Ensures players have enough storage for their games and assets, preventing data loss.

FFlagTelemetryProtoSerializationForBatch.mechanism: Enhances how data is collected and sent for analysis.
FFlagTelemetryProtoSerializationForBatch.purpose: Provides better insights into player behavior, helping improve game features.

FFlagChromeWindowSignalConstraintsToggle.mechanism: Adjusts how signals are managed in the Chrome browser window.
FFlagChromeWindowSignalConstraintsToggle.purpose: Enhances performance and stability of Roblox games played in Chrome.

FFlagAXTryOnScreenImprovements6_Staged.mechanism: Enhances the user interface for try-on features.
FFlagAXTryOnScreenImprovements6_Staged.purpose: Provides a smoother and more visually appealing experience when trying on items.

FFlagCancelButtonWidthToState_Staged.mechanism: Adjusts the width of the cancel button based on its state.
FFlagCancelButtonWidthToState_Staged.purpose: Makes the cancel button more user-friendly and easier to interact with.

DFFlagCaptureServiceHandleAssetUploadQuo.mechanism: Implements a system to manage asset upload limits.
DFFlagCaptureServiceHandleAssetUploadQuo.purpose: Informs players when they have reached their upload limit, preventing confusion.

DFIntSQLiteBusyChkpointMaxReport.mechanism: Sets a maximum report limit for busy SQLite checkpoints.
DFIntSQLiteBusyChkpointMaxReport.purpose: Improves database performance and reliability, enhancing overall game stability.

FFlagGetVoiceChatStateFromControlPlane.mechanism: Fetches the current state of voice chat from a central server.
FFlagGetVoiceChatStateFromControlPlane.purpose: Ensures players have accurate information about voice chat availability.

FIntSQLiteCacheKeysExternalReserve_Stage.mechanism: Increases the number of keys that can be cached externally in SQLite.
FIntSQLiteCacheKeysExternalReserve_Stage.purpose: Improves performance by allowing more data to be quickly accessed, leading to faster game loading times.

DFIntDataStoreFixedRequestLimit_PlaceFil.mechanism: Sets a fixed limit on the number of requests to data stores, filtered by place.
DFIntDataStoreFixedRequestLimit_PlaceFil.purpose: Ensures fair usage of data storage, preventing overload and maintaining game stability for players.

FFlagAppChatHandleAgeChange_Staged.mechanism: Updates how the chat system processes changes in user age.
FFlagAppChatHandleAgeChange_Staged.purpose: Enhances chat safety and compliance, ensuring a better experience for players based on their age.
